title: Iran war will spare no major economy, says OECD — but the UK is more vulnerable than others
summary_full: The U.K. is predicted to be worse hit by the Iran war than its developed market counterparts, the OECD said in its interim economic outlook on Thursday.
summary_public: The U.K. is predicted to be worse hit by the Iran war than its developed market counterparts, the OECD said in its interim economic outlook on Thursday.

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: the UK is more vulnerable than others

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war will spare no major economy
